Mastering B2C App Growth: The TikTok-Instagram Marketing Blueprint

The OpenClaw B2C Marketing skill implements a proven 5-phase framework for driving app downloads through organic short-form video marketing on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. This battle-tested methodology achieved 30,000 downloads in 30 days with zero ad spend.

Why Short-Form Video Dominates Mobile App Marketing

Short-form video content has become the most effective channel for consumer app marketing due to:

  1. Algorithm Affinity: Platform algorithms prioritize watch time and comments, which short-form videos naturally incentivize
  2. Low Barrier Engagement: 15-30 second videos provide instant value without commitment
  3. Discovery Potential:

    Skill can be found at: https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/ceo991/b2c-marketing-1-0-1/SKILL.md
excerpt: Discover the proven 5-phase strategy for organic app growth using short-form video marketing on TikTok & Instagram
title: Mastering B2C App Growth: The TikTok-Instagram Marketing Blueprint
